zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD处于高位震荡偏强结构，价格60500附近运行，多头仍占优势但动能放缓，短线进入整理区间需关注突破延续

技术指标方面MACD保持正值331上方，显示多头动能仍在，但RSI缺失需谨慎判断超买状态短期仍偏强但需确认信号过滤波动风险注意波动加剧

支撑位关注59600附近及59000整数关口，阻力集中在60500与60800区域，突破将打开上行空间需警惕回踩确认情况

操作建议以回调低吸为主，激进可在60000上方轻仓试多，跌破59600则需控制仓位等待二次确认避免追高风险并分批建仓执行纪律

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading around 60415 after a modest 0.5% 24h gain, showing a controlled bullish consolidation near intraday highs. Price action remains tightly compressed between 59950 and 60416, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The structure suggests a short-term uptrend, as buyers continue defending pullbacks and pushing price toward upper range boundaries with limited volatility expansion.

Momentum indicators lean bullish, with MACD reading at 331.46 signaling positive momentum continuation despite the absence of a visible signal line value. Price holding above the 20-period SMA at 59622 reinforces an underlying uptrend structure. However, RSI is unavailable, limiting overbought/oversold assessment. The proximity to recent highs suggests potential short-term exhaustion risk, though trend strength remains intact unless momentum sharply contracts.

Immediate resistance is defined at 60416, where price is currently testing supply. A clean breakout could open upside toward 60650 and then the psychological 61000 level. On the downside, initial support sits at 59950, followed closely by the 20-SMA near 59623, which acts as dynamic trend support. A breakdown below this zone would weaken the bullish structure and expose 59000 as the next significant support.

For trading strategy, momentum traders may consider breakout longs above 60420 with confirmation and stops below 60000 to manage false break risk. Alternatively, dip-buying near 59620–59950 offers a trend-aligned approach with improved risk-reward. Short positions are less favorable while price holds above the SMA20, though scalpers may fade resistance for quick reversals. Strict risk management is essential given tight consolidation and potential volatility expansion.
